title.en: The Abyss Lord Enrodomas laughed cruelly.

content.en:
"Outsider, you dare to break into my territory, and dare to kill the abyss monster in front of me, I haven't eaten for a long time, I will use you as a stomach filler today!"

The Abyss Lord Enrodomas laughed cruelly.

Rumble!!!

Enrodobas kicked over, and the void shattered directly.

Hundreds of millions of miles of void suppressed Xiang Ye Tian, this terrifying strength is enough to easily wipe out a large number of half-step true ancestors, even if it is a true monarch in the top few on the True Monarch List, he can kill the true ancestor beyond the level, but in front of such an existence, he is just a mantis arm as a car.

Ye Tian activated the body of the Extreme Dao, showed all the physical strength, and then used the Origin Divine Power to shake the sky and collide with Enrodobas.

Boom!!

Ye Tian flew out upside down, but Enrodomas only retreated a few times.

In this confrontation, Ye Tian fell into the disadvantage.

"Hey, just an abyssal monster-level ant can block my blow!" Enrodobas was shocked.

As the Lord of the Abyss, he occasionally goes out of his own territory, and in his impression, the Abyss Monster-level ants are simply food, and a wisp of breath can shock a batch to death.

But now, it is so abnormal that such an ant can block his attack!

And Ye Tian was also surprised by the power of the Abyss Lord, how terrifying his strength was, the strength of the True Ancestor was far inferior to him, and it could even be said that some of the top True Ancestors were inferior to him in terms of strength.

The power of the True Ancestor lies in the power of the Great Dao and the power of the True Ancestor, and although some True Ancestors can continue to cultivate the Chaos Alchemy Technique, the effect is not too good.

Even many True Ancestors have given up refining their bodies, and their body strength is not strong.

But the body of the abyss lord in front of him was too terrifying, it was many times stronger than a dao weapon, and Ye Tian's blow could not leave a trace on the other party.

"It seems that I underestimated the Abyss Lord, no wonder the major forces in the Domain Realm are extremely jealous of the Abyss Demon Clan, only the real top Tianjiao figures can compete with the Abyss Demon Clan above the Abyss Lord!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If it weren't for the fact that the Abyss Demon Clan had a limit, there would be no Supreme Dao Ancestor, and the Supreme Dao Ancestor would clean up the Abyss every once in a while, and even hunt down the Abyss Demon Clan.

Otherwise, the controllers of the Divine Heaven Realm would probably become the Abyss Demon Clan!

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and the Abyss Lord Enrodobas kept fighting, and the battle between the two almost destroyed this area, which made Enrodobas very angry, because this was his territory.

After fighting for a while, Ye Tian also discovered a weakness of Enrodobas, that is, his speed was a little slower, and his soul was not very strong.

Therefore, Ye Tian specialized in attacking the soul of Enrodobas, and then pinned down the other party with speed, and attacked it from time to time with the Sky Splitting Technique.

In such a situation, Ye Tian had the upper hand, but it was far from enough to kill Enrodobas.

The Abyss Lord was already difficult to kill, and with Enrodobas' being so powerful, it was too difficult to kill him.

Unless Ye Tian was promoted to True Ancestor, he didn't want to kill an Abyss Lord easily.

Time passes little by little -

One day!

Ten days!

Although Enrodobas would not be seriously injured, it was extremely tired of such a protracted battle.

"Mole ant, no, strong man, let's stop, how about it?"

Enrodobas said.

"Stop?"

Ye Tian really stopped, did not continue to attack, and showed a hesitant look.

He actually didn't want to fight, after all, he didn't have the ability to kill an Abyss Lord, he could only achieve preliminary suppression, such a battle was meaningless, it was just a waste of time.

But there's no way he's really going to stop like that!

"Why should I stop, I have time! Unless you can give me some benefits, I am willing to leave!" Ye Tian said.

"Greedy fellow, you want to ask for a favor like the great Enrodobas?"

Enrodobas was furious.

If it weren't for the fact that he couldn't beat Ye Tian, he really wanted to eat Ye Tian.

"If you don't give it, then keep fighting!" Ye Tian said resolutely.

"This ......"

Enrodobas is entangled, it really doesn't want to fight, how good it would be to go back to sleep!

After hesitating for half a minute, Enrodobas spoke again: "Okay, I can give you some treasures, and even give you a chance, how about it?"

"I want a treasure of merger, do you have it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"What kind of treasure?" said Nrodobas, puzzled.

Immediately, Ye Tian said some of the characteristics of the Hedao treasure.

At this time, Enrodobas suddenly realized: "It turns out that what you want are those abyssal strange things!"

Abyssal Wonders!

This is the name of the Abyss Lord for the treasure of the Abyss, and this title is also very reasonable, after all, it can assist the Merge, and such a treasure is naturally a strange thing in the Abyss.

It's just that the Merge Treasure is not very attractive to the Abyss Lord, they take the path of bloodline evolution, as long as the Abyss Lord bloodline on their body evolves step by step to the overlord bloodline, and then causes the physical body to transform, they can directly evolve to the Abyss Overlord.

As for what is the way, what it is, they don't understand it at all.

It was precisely because of the lack of understanding of the Great Dao that the strength of the Abyss Overlord had an upper limit, so he did not compete with the cultivators' forces.

"How about ten abyssal strange things, I only have so many, this thing is of little use to me, and I haven't collected much. Enrodobas proposed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed, and was even very excited in his heart.

Ten abyssal strange things, these treasures are enough to cultivate a few Dao ancestors, no wonder the domain realm says that there are many treasures in the Wuji Abyss, and there are countless opportunities.

Just one Abyss Lord has so many Merge Dao Treasures, how many Merge Dao Treasures are there in the entire Infinite Abyss Fragment?

At this time, Ye Tian finally understood why there were so many Dao Ancestors in the domain realm, not only because the inheritance was powerful, but also because the treasures of the Dao were not rare.

The Upper Triple Heaven Force has so many Merge Dao treasures, and it is too simple to cultivate a Dao Ancestor.

Like the top Nine Heavens forces, I'm afraid that the average Dao Ancestor is only a mid-level, and I don't know how many Dao Ancestors there are in the headquarters.

"If I occupy the Infinite Abyss Fragment, I'm afraid I can cultivate a large number of Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian said hopefully.

But this idea can only be thought about for the time being, the water of the Infinite Abyss is very deep, and even the Imperial Beast Sect probably doesn't know much about the Infinite Abyss, and they probably only know it superficially.

"Where's the chance?"

Ye Tian asked.

Enrodobas said: "There is a place in the Infinite Abyss, not very far from here, there is a strange entrance there, and many abyssal monsters have entered it and promoted to the Abyss Lord, but there are some dangers inside. But there are a lot of abyssal artifacts out there, and I took a few of them the last time I went. However, after becoming the Abyss Lord, I can't get in! Your cultivation is still at the Abyss Monster level, but your strength has reached the Abyss Lord level, if you go there, there should be no danger, and you can also get a large number of Convergence Strange Objects and treasures, and even other treasures, this is a real great opportunity!"

Subsequently, Enrodobas informed Ye Tian of the specific location, and took out the strange object and gave it to Ye Tian.

At this point, the deal is complete!

Ye Tian turned to leave, and not long after Ye Tian left, Enrodobas sneered: "Greedy guy, you definitely want to enter there." It's a little bit that I'm not wrong, it's true that only the abyss monster level is allowed to enter there, and there are also a lot of Hedao treasures and opportunities, but it's too dangerous there, and I just retreated a little bit deeper. It's too mysterious there, and if you don't pay attention to it, you will fall, and this guy may be greedy and fall directly!"

He didn't dwell on the question, and turned back to his lair to sleep.

The other side.

Ye Tian was also thinking about the place that Enrodobas said.

He also knew very well that Enrodobas must have concealed the information, but according to his calculations, it was definitely a place of great opportunity, but it was also very dangerous.

To go, or not to go?

Ye Tian fell into indecision!
